body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"too_large: The bead bundles at least three independent scopes: routinglint for retired routing symbols/string literals, runtimelint for *Runtime durable knobs and legacy options, and a separate terminology/file-path guardrail for new `ddx agent` / `cli/internal/agent` drift. FEAT-006:29-37 and 71-74 keep provider/model/harness passthrough opaque to DDx, while FEAT-010:31-34 says `internal/agent` is legacy naming only. The repo already splits these concerns into distinct analyzers and tests (`cli/tools/lint/routinglint/analyzer.go:63-105`, `cli/tools/lint/runtimelint/analyzer.go:39-75`, `cli/tools/lint/routinglint/integration_test.go:11-40`), so this is not a single atomic implementation prompt.","fingerprint":"4a4c61c4c495026c402b5fc3d74cf2535cc4223730d9e55d287891592f499c0c","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"readiness_best_effort","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.readiness_best_effort","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment"}

{"rationale":"7/8: the title, numbered/verifiable acceptance criteria, test/lefthook gates, labels, parent/deps, and sub-agent usability all meet the lint floor; the description misses the required concrete file:line current-state/root-cause anchor, so it does not fully satisfy the bead-authoring rubric.","score":7,"suggested_fixes":["Add file:line citations in the ROOT CAUSE or CURRENT STATE section for the existing guardrail and the specific lint codepaths this bead will extend.","If the intent is to supersede ddx-0ca4ffda, name the exact file(s) or lint rule(s) being amended so the replacement boundary is explicit."],"waivers_applied":[]}
